name: Missing Links Driving Range, Golf Course, Miniature Golf, Toptracer, Sports Bar
address: 12950 N Port Washington Rd, Mequon, WI 53097
about: Missing Links is a comprehensive golf entertainment venue featuring a driving range, a 9-hole Jack Nicklaus Par 3 course, an 18-hole miniature golf course, and a full-service sports bar with ice cream and coffee cafe. The facility is equipped with Trackman indoor simulators and outdoor Toptracer bays, offering year-round practice and play options. It operates as a family-friendly destination with leagues, lessons, and event hosting capabilities, all with amenities like heated stalls and stadium lighting.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round heated facilities with both indoor Trackman and outdoor Toptracer technology
Combination of traditional golf course, driving range, and family fun mini-golf
Full-service clubhouse with sports bar and food options for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and ice cream/coffee cafe available in the clubhouse
Full bar service available in the clubhouse sports bar

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Bringing your own clubs is recommended, though rental clubs may be available. Contact the venue directly for details on club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full kitchen, ice cream/coffee cafe, and a sports bar with food and beverage options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round of simulator golf take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round of virtual golf typically takes 1-2 hours, depending on group size and pace of play. The last round of mini-golf is sold 1 hour before closing time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Missing Links is highly kid-friendly, featuring an 18-hole miniature golf course, a Par 3 course, simulator games like Angry Birds and Go Fish, and family-friendly leagues.
